title: yayPi Email
description: Defines trigger-based HTML email notifications sent via SMTP. Configure SMTP via SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS, SMTP_SENDER_NAME, SMTP_SENDER_EMAIL environment variables.

EmailDef.description: A single email trigger fired when a lifecycle event occurs on an entity.

name.description: Unique name for this email trigger, used in logs.

entity.description: Entity whose events trigger this email.

trigger.description: Lifecycle event that fires this email.

condition.description: Optional CEL-lite expression. Email only fires if this evaluates to true. Supports record.<field> bindings.

to.description: Recipient email address. Supports {{record.field}} and ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

subject.description: Email subject line. Supports {{record.field}} and ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

body.description: HTML email body. Supports {{record.field}} and ${ENV_VAR} substitution.
